dataset.description: Local structured dataset to return (components/tokens/manifest). Mutually exclusive with kind+runPath.

kind.description: Stage1 structured artifact kind to read from runPath. Requires runPath; mutually exclusive with dataset.

runPath.description: Filesystem path to a Stage1 run directory or its artifacts/ subdirectory. Required when kind is set.

ifNoneMatch.description: Return matched=true without payload when the ETag matches.

includePayload.description: When false, omit payload even if no ETag match occurs.

version.description: Request a specific date-stamped version (e.g., '2026-02-24'). Omit for latest. Applies to dataset mode only.

listVersions.description: When true, return available version dates instead of payload.
